Bytover

Bytover is a free file transfer platform available on all major devices. It supports file transfers across Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android using secure direct connections with optional public sharing.

Bytover uses instant direct transfer technology with automatic relay server fallback. This ensures private transfers even behind NAT or firewall restrictions. Users can share files instantly via link with no upload needed, or create public share links with optional password protection.

Core Features

-   Secure Direct Transfer — Instant transfers with automatic relay fallback. No upload needed.
-   Unlimited File Size — Transfer files of any size without compression or limits.
-   Cross-Platform Support — Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android.
-   Folder Transfer — Send complete folders while preserving directory structure.
-   Instant Share via Link — Generate a shareable link and transfer files instantly.
-   Email Sharing — Send files directly to multiple email addresses.
-   Password-Protected Sharing — Create secure public links with optional passwords.
-   Instant Public Share Links — Generate shareable URLs immediately for public sharing.

Pricing

-   Free for now — We're working on pricing plans.

Getting Started

-   Web App — Transfer files directly in the browser with no installation.
-   Mobile and Desktop Apps — Native apps for Android, iOS, Windows, and macOS (coming later this year).
-   Feature Request — Submit feature ideas and feedback.

Navigation

-   Home — Overview of the platform.
-   Features — Detailed feature descriptions.
-   Pricing — Free for now.
-   Feature Request — Submit feature ideas.

Support & Resources

-   GitHub Repository — Open-source project.
